problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
